parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ duplicate: true, id: $json.id, filename: $json.filename, status: $json.status, chunks: $json.chunks, executionId: $execution.id, message: $json.message || 'Document already indexed' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, processing: true, id: $json.id, filename: $json.filename, collection: $json.collection, executionId: $execution.id, message: 'Document received – indexing in progress' }) }}
